title: Challenging Creatures
description: A very old mod of mine that adds new creatures to your game. It's also very nostalgic for me :,)
body:
Challenging Creatures
-----------------------
This mod adds many creatures to spice up your minecraft world! Many of which are hostile and pose a threat to the player. There are items to be found, advancements to be made, bosses to defeat, and even a few dimensions! Some of the creatures include:

-The Shade

-The Woolly Worm

-The Chomper

-Beast

-Beastly Zombie

-Gargantuan Slug

This mod is great for people who just want more mobs for minecraft!

IMPORTANT: This mod will no longer be updated!
